title: Create SFTP User on Mittwald Project
description: Developer needs to create an SFTP user account on their Mittwald project for file uploads.
prompt: I need to set up file upload access for a contractor on my Mittwald project. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to first list my projects, then create an SFTP user called 'contractor-design' with access to the /uploads directory.

I need to set up file upload access for a contractor who's doing design work for us. Create an SFTP user named 'contractor-design' with access restricted to the /uploads folder. Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover the project information yourself and make reasonable choices for any parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.
